form.formComment: Mixing form recently. Last start was 2nd over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 2nd- beaten 3.5 m by Catchmegracefully (1:55.20) in FM on April 6 at $51.45. Before that beaten 6 metres, sixth at Flamboro Downs over 1609m FM on April 2. Prepared to just watch.

form.formComment: Last start by 1.0 m at Flamboro Downs (1:59.20) beating Ak Black Badger in FM on March 28 at $3.60 at the bell was leading. Must be respected in this sort of form.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 2.5 m fifth behind Muchtooyoungforyou at this track over 1609m FM last start. Before that was beaten 1.75 metres third again at this track same class on March 29. Racing well and worth each-way consideration.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 6th over 1609m at this track was 7th- at the bell, beaten 10 m by Catchmegracefully (1:55.20) in FM on April 6 at $41.95. Before that 6th over 1609m at Western Fair Raceway beaten 25 m by Shady Memories (2:01.30) in FM on February 3 at $14.55. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Seven-year-old mare is racing in fine form. Won her last two outings at this track and Flamboro Downs both over 1609m. Last start won by a nose as favourite at this track (1:53.40) beating Pretty Missy May in FM on March 29 at $1.90 at the bell was leading. Racing in great heart and another win is on the cards.

form.formComment: Racing consistently with minor placings at her last two starts. Placed last start 2nd over 1609m at Flamboro Downs, at the bell was 3rd- beaten 1.0 m by Cool Cute Cookie (1:59.20) in FM on March 28 at $3.80. Before that 3rd over 1609m at Flamboro Downs was 3rd- at the bell, beaten 4 m by Lucy And Ethel (2:01.00) in FM on March 21 at $6. Others preferred at this stage.

form.formComment: Solid run when a close second behind Muchtooyoungforyou at this track over 1609m in a FM on March 29 at $2.25. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2 m finishing third behind Muchtooyoungforyou at this track over 1609m in a FM on April 6 at $2.35. Has the ability to take this out.
